microsoft_ft: Owned a 0→1 consumer-facing resilience product end-to-end, scaling a 2-person operation into a platformized offering serving **45+ annual drills** and driving **$14M+ in business impact** across premium enterprise customers (Databricks, Walmart, SAP, NetApp).

Translated strategic priorities into an ambitious roadmap for an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining PRDs and self-service scheduling that **reduced operational toil 30%** and unlocked a scalable, customer-obsessed delivery model.

Shipped Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability in **4 months** with a **94% recovery rate**, running rapid experiments at the rack level to surface critical defects and iterate toward a differentiated, high-quality offering.

Led a cross-functional pod of engineers, designers, and data scientists across **14 executive-visibility recovery executions**, including bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**.
Leveraged AI tools and emerging tech to accelerate team workflows, building an internal **AI agent** and restructuring planning that cut cycle time **39%** and grew drill capacity **21%**.

Defined success metrics and ran A/B-style validation experiments across rider-analogous enterprise segments, using data analysis and user research to inform roadmap tradeoffs communicated clearly from partner teams up to VP/executive levels.
microsoft_2023: Drove product adoption of AI-driven code generation across **14 consumer-facing service teams**, running demos, user research, and onboarding that saved **37 engineering hours monthly** and deepened customer empathy.
Shaped the roadmap to include intent-based YAML generation by leading **11+ customer discovery interviews** with Azure teams, translating qualitative insights into prioritized feature bets.
Migrated documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** experience with rigorous metadata standards, **cutting lookup time 83%** and measurably improving the end-user retrieval journey.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions **28% faster** by driving cross-functional alignment on a unified prioritization framework spanning **140+ teams**.
Ran customer discovery with **20+ service teams** to quantify **81 hours of manual toil** per region launch, then built a roadmap automating the critical path to scale supply-side launches.
Shipped a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, equipping leadership with the data fluency to target high-impact automation investments.
amazon_robotics: Owned a legacy OS migration roadmap end-to-end, mapping dependencies across **1,200+ stations** and delivering **zero downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot in a complex marketplace-style fleet.
Facilitated Agile ceremonies and prioritized the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets**, maintaining team momentum and unblocking engineers, designers, and ops partners.
Aligned IT, Operations, and Engineering on automated **CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the ship-and-iterate deployment cycle **25%** to enable rapid experimentation.
pro_painters: Grew job bookings **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing experience for **200+ monthly proposals** via a new CRM-powered customer journey.
Executed a digital-first GTM strategy that **cut CAC 13%** and lifted conversion **2.7%**, optimizing the consumer funnel across web and Google profile touchpoints.
Ran profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records** to inform premium pricing models, surfacing margin leaks and shaping leadership's tiered-offering strategy.

tailoring_notes: Relabeled all roles to Product Manager variants to mirror Lyft PM JD.
Emphasized end-to-end ownership, experimentation, customer obsession, cross-functional pod leadership, and AI tooling per JD.
